title: Death note
description: This resource pack allows you to change the texture of the book by renaming to a notebook from the anime "Death note"
body:
---
## To use the resource pack you need ["Optifine"](https://optifine.net/downloads)
---
**Resource pack allows you to rename the book, which will turn it into a book from the anime "Death note"**

**You can use this resource pack as you like**

<details>
<summary>Usage guide</summary>

## **Just rename the book to "Death note"**

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/7UiP01ZR/images/c4a6c557742b09d66710c310d5e0b472ee291b07.gif)

</details>

---
